# BarChart

Data-driven SVG bar chart for @rokkit/chart.

## Import

```svelte
import { BarChart } from '@rokkit/chart'
```

## Usage

```svelte
<!-- Basic bar chart -->
<BarChart data={sales} x="category" y="revenue" />

<!-- With color coding -->
<BarChart data={sales} x="category" y="revenue" color="region" legend />

<!-- With grid -->
<BarChart data={sales} x="category" y="revenue" grid />
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| data | Object[] | [] | Chart data |
| x | string | — | X axis field |
| y | string | — | Y axis field |
| color | string | — | Color channel field |
| pattern | string | — | Pattern fill channel field |
| fill | string | — | Fill channel field |
| size | string | — | Size channel field |
| width | number | 600 | SVG width |
| height | number | 400 | SVG height |
| mode | 'light' \| 'dark' | 'light' | Color palette mode |
| grid | boolean | true | Show gridlines |
| legend | boolean | false | Show legend |

## Notes

- Uses ChartBrewer internally for reactive data binding
- Color coding uses the palette assigned by assignColors utility
- Compatible with the declarative Chart wrapper via shared context key
